notes: Gravity for the Roberts house. The drip, the bird, the radio, the seismic report, the casserole in the freezer, the unopened mail. Endgame cards bring the boy with the envelope, Mrs. Theriot in the station wagon, and the holding-each-other-in-the-kitchen finale. Grounded reality: the faucet drips because the pipes are from the seventies; the radio jingle for D'Ambrosio's Houston ad is what comes after the seismic report. No animism.

deck.title: the drip
deck.flavor: drip. drip. drip. philip's metronome this morning. it has, by the time you notice it again, gotten louder.

deck.title: the bird at the window
deck.flavor: the unidentifiable bird, probably plotting the demise of the tomato seedlings. it has been at it since six.

deck.title: seismic report
deck.flavor: experts remain baffled. ongoing monitoring continues. the radio host's tone has not changed since february.

deck.title: the d'ambrosio's jingle
deck.flavor: a jingle for the new houston location follows the seismic report. alberto's place. mackenzie makes a face.

deck.title: the casserole in the freezer
deck.flavor: you open the freezer for ice and see it. foil-wrapped. the foil dimpled in the pattern of the fingers that pressed it back. you close the freezer.

deck.title: the loom picks back up
deck.flavor: you walk past the spare room. the loom is there. the work in progress is at three inches. you do not, today, sit. but you notice it has not, in your absence, gotten worse.

deck.title: the sourdough starter
deck.flavor: you feed the starter. flour and water, in the ratio it likes. it has been alive since '19. it does not ask for anything more than this.

deck.title: philip picks up the wrench
deck.flavor: and sets it back down again. he does this seven times an hour when the day is the kind of day it is.

deck.title: an unopened envelope
deck.flavor: in the bowl with the pinecones from four octobers ago. the return address is a credit-card company. you'll get to it.

deck.title: the hand on a flat stomach
deck.flavor: you catch yourself doing it. philip catches himself noticing, and not mentioning. the gesture has been habitual since the loss last year.

deck.title: philip in the doorway
deck.flavor: you sit at the loom. he stands in the doorway for a full minute. he does not interrupt. he goes back to the kitchen.

deck.title: morning light on the pine floor
deck.flavor: through the screen door, the soft grid the screen makes when the sun is in the southeast.

deck.title: a knock at the front door
deck.flavor: nobody knocks at this hour. nobody knocks, generally. a knock is an event. a knock is, frequently, news.

deck.title: the station wagon at the curb
deck.flavor: idling. you can see it through the screen. an older woman at the wheel you half-recognize. mrs. theriot from the storm drain crew, maybe.

deck.title: the morning holds
deck.flavor: philip's arms around you from behind. the radio finishes its weather report and moves on to the obituaries. the drip keeps time.
